info.name: Microsoft Azure NetworkResourceProviderClient
info.description: The Windows Azure Network management API provides a RESTful set of web services that interact with Windows Azure Networks service to manage your network resources. The API has entities that capture the relationship between an end user and the Windows Azure Networks service.

item.name: subscriptions
{subscriptionId}
resourceGroups
{resourceGroupName}
providers
Microsoft.Network
applicationGateways
{applicationGatewayName}
start
Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Network Applicationgateways Applicationgatewayname Start

variable.description: (Required) Gets subscription credentials which uniquely identify Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the URI for every service call.
(Required) The name of the resource group.
(Required) The name of the application gateway.

request.description: The Start ApplicationGateway operation starts application gateway in the specified resource group through Network resource provider.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
